Question / Requirement: Per-player surcharge (e.g. Pickleball Junction: ₱800 base + ₱100 per extra player) — pricing model must support add-on-per-head, not just flat court rate
Decision / Working Assumption: Pricing engine needs base rate + per-additional-player charge as a configurable rule

Question / Requirement: Base court price (default hourly rate per court)
Time-based pricing (e.g. price changes after 6 PM)
Decision / Working Assumption: Configurable per court, tied to schedule

Question / Requirement: Day-based pricing (weekday vs weekend vs holiday)
Member pricing (special rate for venue members)
Court-specific price overrides
Decision / Working Assumption: Pricing tied to court level, not venue level

Question / Requirement: Manual surge adjustment (owner raises/lowers specific slots)
Suggested dynamic pricing (demand-based recommendation)
Decision / Working Assumption: After enough data; owner stays in control
Progress: DONE — PricingSuggestionsCard + getSuggestedPricing API fully built; was mislabeled Deferred

Question / Requirement: Automated dynamic pricing (opt-in)
Progress: NOT STARTED — no auto-apply cron/scheduler; owner must manually review & apply suggestions

Question / Requirement: Currency, VAT/tax handling, and whether displayed price is inclusive
Decision / Working Assumption: PH prices usually VAT-inclusive; confirm display convention

Question / Requirement: Deposit vs full payment vs pay-at-venue at checkout
7% player service fee display (one fee shown; PayMongo 2.5% buried inside)
Half-court / split-court pricing (some venues rent half a court)
Decision / Working Assumption: Court model may need sub-court units

Question / Requirement: Open-play / per-session pricing vs whole-court block
Decision / Working Assumption: Is open-play booking live at launch or Phase 2?

Question / Requirement: Equipment/paddle rental add-ons
Manual booking/blocking for phone, Messenger, IG, walk-ins
Decision / Working Assumption: Scheduler must allow staff to block slots from outside channels

Question / Requirement: Auto-generated booking link (system-created, optional custom slug)
Manual vs automatic approval, configurable per venue/court
Recurring bookings (weekly regulars, leagues)
Double-booking collision handling for Group B venues already on software
Decision / Working Assumption: Start Group B at Level 2 (request-to-approve) not Level 3

Question / Requirement: Cancellation & refund rules (window, fees, no-show policy)
Booking modification (reschedule, change court)
Overbooking / waitlist for full slots
Buffer/turnover time between bookings
Address autocomplete + auto-geocoding (no manual map pin)
Multiple venues per owner
Multiple courts per venue
Court details: surface, photos, thumbnail, description
Operating hours / availability per court
Separate venue website field vs platform booking link
Profile completion prompts
Amenities/facilities (parking, showers, aircon, lighting, indoor/outdoor)
Venue claim flow (claim unclaimed directory listing)
Court sport/type field in data model
Decision / Working Assumption: Don't block multi-sport; court has sport field
Progress: DONE — sport field + 6-sport picker in CourtsEditorTab

Question / Requirement: Should multi-sport be visible in first demo or only in data model?
Progress: NOT STARTED — data model done but player-facing UI visibility not yet decided

Question / Requirement: Owner view: revenue, occupancy, business performance
Operator/staff view: today's schedule, pending approvals, manual entries, cancellations
Who is primary dashboard user: owner, manager, front-desk, or all? Multiple users, different levels of access?
Busiest hours / underused slots / revenue by court

Question / Requirement: Minimum credible analytics view before owner demo
Demand data capture (searches, views, attempts, completions, cancellations, empty slots)
Platform-curated highlights (not owner-invented claims)

Question / Requirement: Multi-user/staff accounts per venue with permissions
Owner identity verification / anti-fraud on venue claim

Question / Requirement: Payout schedule & reconciliation to venue (how/when venues get paid)
BIR-compliant receipts / official receipt generation
